title: Should I pay off credit card debt before investing?
question_body: Community question about should i pay off credit card debt before investing?
answer_body: Pay off high-interest credit card debt before investing. A guaranteed ~20% avoided interest usually beats uncertain market returns.
combined_text: Should I pay off credit card debt before investing? Community question about should i pay off credit card debt before investing? Pay off high-interest credit card debt before investing. A guaranteed ~20% avoided interest usually beats uncertain market returns. credit-card debt investing

title: Should I pay off credit card debt before investing?
question_body: Community question about should i pay off credit card debt before investing?
answer_body: Contribute enough to capture any employer match, then prioritise the card balance and a small emergency buffer.

title: Should I pay off credit card debt before investing?
question_body: Community question about should i pay off credit card debt before investing?
answer_body: Compare the card APR with your expected after-tax return. Above roughly 8-10% APR, paying the debt almost always wins.
combined_text: Should I pay off credit card debt before investing? Community question about should i pay off credit card debt before investing? Compare the card APR with your expected after-tax return. Above roughly 8-10% APR, paying the debt almost always wins. credit-card debt investing

title: How do I get out of credit card debt fastest?
question_body: Community question about how do i get out of credit card debt fastest?
answer_body: List balances, attack the highest APR first (avalanche), and stop new charges while you repay.
combined_text: How do I get out of credit card debt fastest? Community question about how do i get out of credit card debt fastest? List balances, attack the highest APR first (avalanche), and stop new charges while you repay. credit-card debt budgeting

title: How do I get out of credit card debt fastest?
question_body: Community question about how do i get out of credit card debt fastest?
answer_body: The snowball method (smallest balance first) can help motivation even if it costs slightly more interest.

title: How much emergency fund should I keep?
question_body: Community question about how much emergency fund should i keep?
answer_body: Three to six months of essential expenses, kept liquid in a high-yield savings account, not in volatile assets.
combined_text: How much emergency fund should I keep? Community question about how much emergency fund should i keep? Three to six months of essential expenses, kept liquid in a high-yield savings account, not in volatile assets. emergency-fund saving budgeting

title: How much emergency fund should I keep?

answer_body: If your income is irregular or your job is unstable, target the higher end of the range.

title: Where should I keep my emergency savings?
question_body: Community question about where should i keep my emergency savings?
answer_body: Safety and liquidity first: high-yield savings or short Treasury bills, not equities you may have to sell at a loss.

title: Is it better to rent or buy a house?
question_body: Community question about is it better to rent or buy a house?
answer_body: Compare unrecoverable costs: rent vs mortgage interest, taxes, insurance, maintenance and transaction costs. Buying is not automatically better.
combined_text: Is it better to rent or buy a house? Community question about is it better to rent or buy a house? Compare unrecoverable costs: rent vs mortgage interest, taxes, insurance, maintenance and transaction costs. Buying is not automatically better. mortgage rent buy housing

title: Is it better to rent or buy a house?

title: Should I refinance my mortgage?
question_body: Community question about should i refinance my mortgage?
answer_body: Refinance when interest savings exceed closing costs and you will keep the loan past the break-even point.
combined_text: Should I refinance my mortgage? Community question about should i refinance my mortgage? Refinance when interest savings exceed closing costs and you will keep the loan past the break-even point. mortgage refinance interest-rate

title: How are capital gains taxed?
question_body: Community question about how are capital gains taxed?
answer_body: It depends on holding period, income, jurisdiction and cost basis. Separate short-term from long-term and keep records.
combined_text: How are capital gains taxed? Community question about how are capital gains taxed? It depends on holding period, income, jurisdiction and cost basis. Separate short-term from long-term and keep records. tax capital-gains investing

title: How are capital gains taxed?
question_body: Community question about how are capital gains taxed?
answer_body: Losses can offset gains, but wash-sale rules and local law change the result; consult a professional for large trades.
combined_text: How are capital gains taxed? Community question about how are capital gains taxed? Losses can offset gains, but wash-sale rules and local law change the result; consult a professional for large trades. tax capital-gains investing

title: What records do I need for investment taxes?
question_body: Community question about what records do i need for investment taxes?
answer_body: Keep trade confirmations, cost basis, dividend statements and broker 1099s; reconstruct basis before you sell.

title: Should I invest in ETFs or individual stocks?
question_body: Community question about should i invest in etfs or individual stocks?
answer_body: For most investors, diversified low-cost ETFs cut idiosyncratic risk and need less monitoring than single stocks.

title: Is dollar cost averaging better than lump sum?
question_body: Community question about is dollar cost averaging better than lump sum?
answer_body: Historically lump sum has a higher expected return, but averaging reduces timing risk and regret.

title: What should I do if I think an investment is a scam?
question_body: Community question about what should i do if i think an investment is a scam?
answer_body: Stop sending money, preserve all records, verify registration with the regulator, and report the suspected fraud.
